description: Standard UGC (User-Generated Content) video template. Authentic, handheld-feel product videos optimized for TikTok conversion.

emotional_hook.purpose: Grab attention with relatable scenario. First-person POV, breathing movement camera. Never show product or branding.
content_rules: Must contain motion in first frame (no static cards)
No brand logos or product names

pain_point.purpose: Show the problem the product solves. Slow push-in, frustration moments. Build emotional investment.
content_rules: Use close-ups of defects or failures
Transition to solution tease in final grid

product_closeup.purpose: Product hero shots. Detail textures, key features, tactile interactions. Primary conversion driver.
content_rules: Tactile demonstrations: pressing, folding, clicking, pouring
At least one direct comparison with competitor/old product
Show material quality and build details

usage_scenario.purpose: Product in real-world context. Outdoor scene, family using it, before/after comparison.
content_rules: Show product being used by a person

cta.purpose: Price reveal, link in bio, freeze frame with product name. Drive click-through.
content_rules: Clear 'link in bio' call to action
